title: Restore a namespace from a Velero backup
scenario: The `production` namespace was accidentally deleted. A scheduled Velero backup from earlier today exists on S3. You need to: (1) Create a Velero Backup object scoped to the `production` namespace, (2) Create a Restore from that backup. The starter Backup incorrectly includes `staging` instead of `production`.
starterYaml:
apiVersion: velero.io/v1
kind: Backup
metadata:
  name: production-backup
  namespace: velero
spec:
  includedNamespaces:
  - staging
  storageLocation: default
  ttl: 720h

hints.text: Two tasks: fix the Backup's `includedNamespaces` (staging → production), then add a Restore CR that references it.
Add a second YAML document after `---` with `kind: Restore`, pointing to `backupName: production-backup`.

Restore template:
```yaml
apiVersion: velero.io/v1
kind: Restore
metadata:
  name: production-restore
  namespace: velero
spec:
  backupName: production-backup
  includedNamespaces:
  - production
```

solution:
apiVersion: velero.io/v1
kind: Backup
metadata:
  name: production-backup
  namespace: velero
spec:
  includedNamespaces:
  - production
  storageLocation: default
  ttl: 720h
---
apiVersion: velero.io/v1
kind: Restore
metadata:
  name: production-restore
  namespace: velero
spec:
  backupName: production-backup
  includedNamespaces:
  - production
